steps.title: Identify the role of the shared excerpts
steps.content: Volunteers “share digitized excerpts” that “allow the earliest uses of phrases... to be identified.” The blank must name what these shared items are—something that enables the project to work.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choice
steps.content:
Contributions directly captures what the excerpts are: materials provided by volunteers that enable the identification of word origins.

Justifications, resolutions, and negotiations fail to describe either the items being shared or how they enable research.

That matches the correct answer — B is correct.
